enumerate_node_list:
enum
  {
    R0_REGNUM = 0,
    DEFAULT_RETURN_REGNUM = 2,
    STRUCT_RETURN_REGNUM = 2,
    ARG0_REGNUM = 2,
    ARGLAST_REGNUM = 9,
    FLOAT_ARGLAST_REGNUM = 11,
    MEDIA_FP_REGNUM = 14,
    PR_REGNUM = 18,
    SR_REGNUM = 65,
    DR0_REGNUM = 141,
    DR_LAST_REGNUM = 172,
    /* FPP stands for Floating Point Pair, to avoid confusion with
       GDB's gdbarch_fp0_regnum, which is the number of the first Floating
       point register.  Unfortunately on the sh5, the floating point
       registers are called FR, and the floating point pairs are called FP.  */
    FPP0_REGNUM = 173,
    FPP_LAST_REGNUM = 204,
    FV0_REGNUM = 205,
    FV_LAST_REGNUM = 220,
    R0_C_REGNUM = 221,
    R_LAST_C_REGNUM = 236,
    PC_C_REGNUM = 237,
    GBR_C_REGNUM = 238,
    MACH_C_REGNUM = 239,
    MACL_C_REGNUM = 240,
    PR_C_REGNUM = 241,
    T_C_REGNUM = 242,
    FPSCR_C_REGNUM = 243,
    FPUL_C_REGNUM = 244,
    FP0_C_REGNUM = 245,
    FP_LAST_C_REGNUM = 260,
    DR0_C_REGNUM = 261,
    DR_LAST_C_REGNUM = 268,
    FV0_C_REGNUM = 269,
    FV_LAST_C_REGNUM = 272,
    FPSCR_REGNUM = SIM_SH64_FPCSR_REGNUM,
    SSR_REGNUM = SIM_SH64_SSR_REGNUM,
    SPC_REGNUM = SIM_SH64_SPC_REGNUM,
    TR7_REGNUM = SIM_SH64_TR0_REGNUM + 7,
    FP_LAST_REGNUM = SIM_SH64_FR0_REGNUM + SIM_SH64_NR_FP_REGS - 1
  }
